name: MercadoLibre
description: Complete MercadoLibre integration — search products, manage listings, process orders, answer questions, and track shipments across Latin America. Connect your seller account for full access.

tools.name: search_products
tools.description: Search for products on MercadoLibre

tools.name: get_product
tools.description: Get detailed product information by item ID

tools.name: get_category
tools.description: Browse or list product categories

tools.name: get_seller
tools.description: Get seller reputation and details

tools.name: compare_prices
tools.description: Compare prices across multiple listings

tools.name: list_sites
tools.description: List available MercadoLibre country sites

tools.name: get_trends
tools.description: Get trending searches for a country

tools.name: get_product_reviews
tools.description: Get buyer reviews and ratings for a product

tools.name: get_product_description
tools.description: Get the full text description of a product listing

tools.name: get_currency_conversion
tools.description: Convert between currencies using MercadoLibre exchange rates

tools.name: get_my_account
tools.description: Get your MercadoLibre account info (requires auth)

tools.name: list_my_items
tools.description: List your active product listings (requires auth)

tools.name: update_listing
tools.description: Update price, stock, or status of a listing (requires auth)

tools.name: list_orders
tools.description: List your recent sales orders (requires auth)

tools.name: get_order
tools.description: Get details of a specific order (requires auth)

tools.name: list_questions
tools.description: List buyer questions on your listings (requires auth)

tools.name: answer_question
tools.description: Answer a buyer's question (requires auth)

tools.name: get_shipment
tools.description: Get shipment tracking details (requires auth)

tools.name: send_message
tools.description: Send a message in an order conversation (requires auth)

tools.name: get_item_visits
tools.description: Get visit/view statistics for your listings (requires auth)

tools.name: manage_ads
tools.description: Manage Product Ads — check status, activate, or pause (requires auth)
